info.name: GitHub Profile Analyzer API
info.description:
A collection of all endpoints for the GitHub Profile Analyzer API.

**Setup:**
1. Set the `base_url` variable to your server URL (default: `http://localhost:3000`)
2. Change the `username` variable to any valid GitHub username

**Workflow:**
1. Use **Analyze Profile** first to fetch from GitHub and store in MySQL
2. Use **Get Profile** to retrieve from DB
3. Use **Refresh Profile** to re-fetch latest data from GitHub
4. Use **List Profiles** to see all stored profiles
5. Use **Delete Profile** to remove a profile

variable.description: Base URL of the API server

request.description: Check if the server is running and how long it has been up.

Fetch the GitHub user's public profile and all public repositories, compute derived insights (top languages, total stars, forks, most-starred repo, account age), then store or update the result in MySQL.

**Returns 201 on success.**

If the profile already exists in the DB it will be updated (upsert).

response.name: 201 Created — Profile analyzed and stored
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Profile for \"torvalds\" analyzed and stored successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "username": "torvalds",

    "profile_url": "https://github.com/torvalds",
    "company": "Linux Foundation",
    "location": "Portland, OR",
    "blog": "",
    "email": null,
    "twitter_username": null,
    "public_repos": 8,
    "public_gists": 0,
    "followers": 240000,
    "following": 0,
    "top_languages": ["C", "Perl", "Shell"],
    "most_starred_repo": "torvalds/linux",
    "total_stars": 195000,
    "total_forks": 58000,
    "account_age_days": 5200,
    "is_hireable": null,
    "analyzed_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"

}

response.name: 404 Not Found — GitHub user does not exist
400 Bad Request — Invalid username format
429 Too Many Requests — GitHub rate limit exceeded

query.description: Filter by username or display name (optional)

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all GitHub profiles that have been analyzed and stored in the database.

**Query parameters:**
- `page` — page number (default: 1)
- `limit` — items per page (default: 10, max: 100)
- `search` — filter by username or display name

Retrieves a previously analyzed profile from the MySQL database.

Does **not** make a GitHub API call — returns only what is stored in the DB.
To get fresh data, use the **Refresh Profile** endpoint.

response.name: 404 Not Found — Profile not in DB

request.description:
Re-fetches the latest data from GitHub and updates the stored profile in MySQL.

The profile must already exist in the DB (analyze it first). Use this to get updated follower counts, new repos, etc.

response.name: 404 Not Found — Profile not in DB

request.description: Permanently removes a stored profile from the MySQL database.

response.name: 404 Not Found — Profile not in DB
